commit.message:
Replace touchedFields [Text] with Integer bitmask (#2473)

* Replace touchedFields [Text] with Integer bitmask

Replace the `touchedFields :: ![Text]` list in MetaBag with an
`!Integer` bitmask for O(1) set/check operations instead of O(n)
string comparisons.

- Add `TouchedField` type class mapping field names to bit positions
- Schema compiler generates `TouchedField` instances per table
- SetField/UpdateField codegen uses `.|.` instead of cons
- `fieldWithDefault/Update(Snippet)` and `didTouchField` use `.&.`
- For ≤64 columns, fits in a single unboxed machine word (GHC IS#)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Rename TouchedField to FieldBit, fix copyRecord id bit

- Rename `TouchedField` class to `FieldBit`, `touchedFieldBit` to `fieldBit`
- Fix `copyRecord` to clear the id column's bit so `createRecord` uses
  SQL DEFAULT for the primary key instead of the Haskell default value

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add copyRecord test verifying id bit is not touched

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove unused (.|.) import from ModelSupport

Fixes -Werror=unused-imports CI failure. The (.|.) operator is only
used in generated code, not in ModelSupport.hs itself.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove redundant FieldBit import from Form.hs

FieldBit is already re-exported via IHP.Prelude, so the explicit
import from IHP.ModelSupport triggers -Werror=unused-imports in
the nix build.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement Epic 2 stories (2.1, 2.2, 2.3) with code review fixes

Stories implemented:
- 2.1: Story Management API (GET list, GET fetch, POST upload)
- 2.2: Per-story routing with SSR meta tags and localStorage migration
- 2.3: Story listing landing page with hero, cards, completion badges

Code review fixes applied:
- Force dynamic rendering on landing page (was statically generated)
- Guard against undefined SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in POST auth
- Distinguish PGRST116 (404) from other Supabase errors (500)
- Use per-story head-only count queries instead of fetching all rows
- Deduplicate Supabase query with React cache() in story page
- Capture Date once in POST handler for consistent timestamps
- Fix StoryCard date alignment when no player count
- Add migration and error handling tests (163 total, all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(dashboard): Increase search input padding to avoid icon overlap

The placeholder text was overlapping with the search icon. Increased
padding-left from var(--space-5) to calc(var(--space-4) + 28px) to
properly offset the text from the icon.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve duplicate name validation and restore error handling

Exclude soft-deleted items from duplicate name checks when creating or
updating list items. Add validation when restoring to prevent conflicts
with active items that have the same name. Display errors inline in the
modal with loading state on submit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Project Snapshots & Checkpoints (#75)

* feat(snapshot): add backend snapshot engine and Tauri commands

Implement project snapshot functionality using hidden git refs
(refs/amend/snapshots/*). The snapshot engine creates point-in-time
captures of the working tree including untracked files, stored as
commits under custom refs that don't affect the user's branch or HEAD.

Core functions: create, list, restore, delete, diff, and per-file diff.
Tauri commands wrap all operations with spawn_blocking for async safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(snapshot): add frontend snapshot store, panel, and layout integration

Add Zustand snapshot store with create/list/delete/restore/diff actions.
Create SnapshotPanel component with snapshot list, create form, diff
file list, and inline diff viewer using existing DiffFileSection.
Register 'snapshots' as a new PanelMode in uiStore and add toolbar
button and panel rendering in MainLayout. Add Tauri invoke wrappers
for all six snapshot commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Make assigned agents draggable between category pots

Agents inside categories (Active, Sick, etc.) are now draggable
to other categories. Also adds a small × button on hover to
unassign back to the pool.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove data-reveal from /events cards — causes opacity:0 in WebViews

The data-reveal attribute sets opacity:0 via CSS, relying on
IntersectionObserver to add .revealed class. Instagram's in-app browser
doesn't fire the observer for below-fold cards on first paint, leaving
them permanently invisible. Cards don't need scroll-reveal animation
on a listing page — they should just be visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: S82 BUG-S81-02 + BUG-S81-17 — table code 4-digit fix + Hall order confirmation

BUG-S81-02: CartView tableCodeLength default 5→4
- Auto-verify fires only when input length === tableCodeLength
- Real partner codes are 4 digits; 5-box input prevented verification
- isTableVerified stayed false → submit button disabled → order blocked

BUG-S81-17: Hall order feedback improvements
- Toast duration extended 2000ms → 4000ms (was too short, user missed it)
- Added toast.error in processHallOrder catch (setSubmitError only visible
  in CheckoutView, not in drawer → failure was invisible to Hall user)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: trim trailing phantom rows after parsing

trimRef clips !ref before sheet_to_json, but cells with only formatting
can still appear as non-null after parsing with raw:false. After mapping
rows, scan backwards from the end to find the last row with real data
and discard everything after it.

commit.message:
fix: health check via SSH localhost to bypass HTTPS/self-signed cert

curl from GitHub runner hits http:// → 301 → https:// but self-signed
cert causes verification failure. Fix: SSH into EC2 and curl backend
directly on localhost:8000 (bypasses nginx and cert check entirely).
Also increase retries to 30 (5 min) to allow for slow EC2 builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor: 修复架构设计不合理问题

1. 前端 UserContext 全局状态管理
   - 新增 UserContext，统一管理用户信息和管理板块列表
   - 消除 9 个组件中 userApi.me()/myNamespaces() 的重复请求
   - 每次页面加载仅发起 1 次用户请求，替代原先 6+ 次

2. API client 统一请求函数
   - 新增 requestPaginated() 处理带 X-Total-Count 的分页请求
   - threadApi.list 和 memoryApi.list 改用统一函数
   - 消除重复的 fetch/错误处理/Header 注入代码

3. 去掉自动创建用户的假邮箱
   - User.email 改为可选字段（nullable）
   - 添加板块管理员时不再生成 @placeholder.local 假邮箱
   - UserCreate/UserRead schema 同步更新

Fix lftp auth: use script file with proper quoting

LFTP_PASSWORD env var doesn't work for SFTP. Use open -u inside lftp
script file with quoted credentials to handle special characters in
password safely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix TOTP 500 on Vercel: replace otpauth lib with native crypto

The otpauth npm package crashes on Vercel's serverless runtime due to
ESM/CJS bundling issues. Replaced with a pure Node.js crypto
implementation of RFC 6238 TOTP that produces identical codes.

refactor: use globalThis adapter instead of runtime setValidator

Generated tests now reference a `globalThis.__jsonSchemaTestgenValidate`
global instead of importing `validate` from the package. An `adapter.d.ts`
is emitted at the output directory root to provide the type declaration.
This decouples generated tests from a runtime dependency on the package.

feat: add sandbox iframe for run-code command execution (#50)

- Add public/sandbox.html: sandboxed iframe with chain-based page proxy
  that allows eval/new AsyncFunction (relaxed CSP)
- Add "sandbox" entry to manifest.json so Chrome allows the iframe
- Add src/panel/lib/sandbox-runner.ts: manages the sandbox iframe,
  relays page-call chains to background and resolves run-code results
- Update src/panel/lib/run.ts: intercept run-code commands and route
  them through the sandbox iframe instead of the background service worker
- Update src/background.ts: add handlePageCall() to execute chained
  Playwright page method calls forwarded from the sandbox iframe
- Migrate e2e/commands fixtures and tests from Engine+CommandServer
  to the real extension via chrome.runtime.sendMessage; add run-code
  E2E tests that exercise the full sandbox→background→page stack

feat: Agent Session Timeline & Replay (#74)

Create session.rs with SessionEvent enum (serde-tagged), Session/SessionSummary
structs, and SessionCapture managed state for recording timeline events. Includes
JSON file persistence in app data dir, integration hooks for command and file
change recording, and six Tauri commands: start/stop recording, list/get/delete
sessions, and record events from the frontend.

and session list state with Tauri invoke wrappers. Add SessionTimeline and
TimelineEvent components with event grouping (1s correlation), recording
indicator, session list, and per-event detail rendering. Extend PanelMode
to include 'timeline' and wire the Timeline panel into MainLayout toolbar
and panel rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: CSE self-training zero positives — recognize 'Mapping Completed' as Correct

Root cause: The feedback API returns 'Mapping Completed' as the latest
logs[].what entry for confirmed matches, but the extraction code didn't
recognize this status transition, silently skipping all positive examples.
This caused 100+ useless single-class training runs since Feb 23.

Fixes:
- Map 'Mapping Completed' → Correct and 'Team Switched' → Need to swap
- Add fallback to is_mapped_completed/is_team_switched_completed fields
- Add validation gate blocking training when positives = 0 (CLI + API)
- Add INVALID - SINGLE CLASS verdict for single-class evaluations
- Add diagnostic counters (no_feedback_value, unknown_feedback_value)
- Add labeled_records.json as fallback positive source

commit.message:
Fix notification alerts: use snowfall_24h_cm instead of cumulative fresh_snow_cm

Root cause: get_fresh_snow_cm() was reading fresh_snow_cm (cumulative since
last thaw cycle), which stays high for days and triggers misleading alerts
like "20cm of fresh snow" when only 1cm actually fell in 24h.

Fixes:
- Use snowfall_24h_cm (actual recent precipitation) instead of fresh_snow_cm
- Check max across all elevation levels (was only checking one)
- Raise default fresh snow threshold from 1cm to 5cm (1cm is just a dusting)
- Raise forecast threshold from 10cm to 15cm over 3 days
- Updated notification message to say "new snow in the last 24 hours"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add IL adjustment tests and fix calculation logic (Step 5)

4 new tests: juniorAbsorbsIL, seniorProtected, noILWhenPriceUnchanged,
seniorCappedAtReserve. Fixed IL delta calculation to use token excess
(actual - hold) instead of deficit, ensuring penalty takes from tokens
the LP has in abundance. Senior compensation uses full excess amount
capped at available reserve (not proportional to current pool ratio).
Also caps Junior penalty at LP's actual delta from pool.

51 tests passing (47 existing + 4 IL).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: TrancheFi-Hook
repository.description: Uniswap V4 hook that splits LP positions into Senior (fixed yield, priority fees, IL-protected) and Junior (variable yield, absorbs IL first) tranches. Waterfall fee distribution adapts per asset class: 90/10 for stablecoins, 50/50 for volatile pairs, 95/5 for RWAs. Built for UHI8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: build-time and runtime performance optimizations (#47)

Transformer optimizations:
- Merge scan + plugin visitors into single AST pass
- Skip .d.ts and node_modules files in scanner
- IR hash to skip codegen when DI graph unchanged
- Memoize type resolution (symbol + type argument caching)
- Single lifecycle method pass (merge PreDestroy + PostConstruct)
- Merge codegen collection passes into one iteration
- Merge filesystem discovery (plugins + manifests in single scan)
- Cache filesystem discovery for watch mode (discoveryCache option)
- Generator-based getAllDependencies (avoid intermediate arrays)
- Memoize computeRelativeImport in codegen
- Pass pre-computed IR hash to avoid double computation

Runtime optimizations:
- Add preSorted option to ApplicationContext.create()

Benchmark suite:
- Add vitest bench infrastructure (pnpm bench)
- Transformer benchmarks (full pipeline, scanner, codegen)
- Runtime benchmarks (create, get, getAll)
- GitHub Actions workflow for benchmark tracking
- Benchmark results in README.md

Closes #45

commit.message:
fix: wrap Disconnect-SPOService in try/catch to suppress terminating error

-ErrorAction SilentlyContinue doesn't suppress terminating errors.
Disconnect-SPOService throws terminatingly when no session exists,
which was being caught by the outer catch and reported as a connection
failure before Connect-SPOService was ever called.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace corner-gizmo with wall-click direction picker for varmefolie

New UX: click directly on any wall in a small room diagram to set
start wall + strip direction simultaneously.
- Left/Right wall → vertical strips (v), fills from that side
- Top/Bottom wall → horizontal strips (h), fills from that side
Active wall highlights (accent color, 4.5px), arrow points inward,
faint dashed strip preview updates live inside the room diagram.
State simplified: startWall ('left'|'right'|'top'|'bottom') replaces
separate corner+direction. autoAddStrips() now derives both from startWall.
confirmAutoFill() syncs startWall when canvas arrows are clicked.
Same UI pattern ready for varmekabel.
